title: Deepu's Weaponry (Old)
description: Adds unique enchantments and weaponry to the game. Some of these enchantments are movement related to best synergize with the mostly-movement-related weaponry.
body:
### This mod is discontinued. And the title is edited, my username used to go by "Deepu" instead of "Deepie", however that is not the case anymore.

Adds multiple weapons and enchantments to enhance the fighting of the game, all as unique as possible. The enchantments are rare but obtainable through enchantment table, the most common one being the Dashing.

# The Titan
Allows for a whacking experience, this majestic hammer.
- Hitting targets as you are falling will deal extra damage.
- Right click to launch yourself and everything up, you can then hit them again in the air to slam them back down for additional damage.
- If you sneak and right click, launch everything except yourself up, let the fall damage do the trick while you take care of your other targets.
- Apply Ability Distance enchantment with an enchanting table to increase the launch-up distance.

# The Morubane
The preferred weapon of interdimensional hunters, a magical scythe.
- Hitting targets will heal you a small amount.
- Right click to initiate a phase dash, you will phase away in the direction you were looking and teleport as you land. Nothing can injure you during this.
- Apply Ability Distance enchantment with an enchanting table to increase the phasing distance.

# Dashing [Enchantment]
Press [R] to initiate a dash towards the direction you were looking. If you were on the ground, this provides slight upward momentum as well as extra directional push to make-up for the aerial smoothness of this dash, so that using it on the ground isn't unrewarding. Higher tier enchantment will result in a shorter cooldown. (The R keybind is configurable)

# Multi-Jump [Enchantment]
Press [SPACE] while in the air to initiate an extra jump. This could be used to reach higher places or to cancel/reduce fall damage. Higher tear enchantment will result in more jumps up to 4. (The SPACE keybind is configurable)

# Soft Landing [Enchantment]
You will no longer take fall damage. However this is one of the rarest enchantments out there and it cannot be applied to the same boots that has Feather Falling!

## Known Bugs and Issues
- The Titan doesn't launch other players up with right click.
- Initiating a Morubane phase/teleport nearby the same tick you switch dimensions causes your coordinates to be corrupted.


## Supporters and Credits
Thanks a lot to KChicken for helping with the audio design of Dashing and Multi-jump enchantments. Thanks to him, the mod sounds a lot more lively.
He has a program where you can host your minecraft server in your own pc, check it out [here](https://www.auto-mcs.com/)!
